mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS region_id, r.name AS region_name, -- 互动数据保留1位小数 ROUND( (SUM(COALESCE(s.like_count, 0) + COALESCE(f.like_count, 0) + COALESCE(g.like_count, 0) + COALESCE(rt.like_count, 0)) * 0.3) + (SUM(COALESCE(s.collect_count, 0) + COALESCE(f.collect_count, 0) + COALESCE(g.collect_count, 0) + COALESCE(rt.collect_count, 0)) * 0.6) + (SUM(COALESCE(s.comment_count, 0) + COALESCE(f.comment_count, 0) + COALESCE(g.comment_count, 0) + COALESCE(rt.comment_count, 0)) * 0.4), 1 ) AS interactive_data, -- 热度数据保留1位小数 ROUND( (SUM(COALESCE(s.view_count, 0) + COALESCE(f.view_count, 0) + COALESCE(g.view_count, 0)) * 0.1) + (SUM(COALESCE(s.like_count, 0) + COALESCE(f.like_count, 0) + COALESCE(g.like_count, 0) + COALESCE(rt.like_count, 0)) * 0.5) + (SUM(COALESCE(s.collect_count, 0) + COALESCE(f.collect_count, 0) + COALESCE(g.collect_count, 0) + COALESCE(rt.collect_count, 0)) * 1.0) + (SUM(COALESCE(s.comment_count, 0) + COALESCE(f.comment_count, 0) + COALESCE(g.comment_count, 0) + COALESCE(rt.comment_count, 0)) * 0.8), 1 ) AS heat_data FROM regions r -- 关联各表时新增近一个月时间筛选 LEFT JOIN scenics s ON r.id = s.region_id AND s.status = 1 AND s.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) LEFT JOIN foods f ON r.id = f.region_id AND f.status = 1 AND f.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) LEFT JOIN guides g ON r.id = g.region_id AND g.status = 1 AND g.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) LEFT JOIN routes rt ON r.id = rt.ext1 AND rt.status = 1 AND rt.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) WHERE r.level = 2 GROUP BY r.id, r.name ORDER BY heat_data DESC;
